expectations.text: Uses git worktree list to find the main worktree
expectations.evidence: Output says 'Memory loaded from ../memory.md' — used relative path fallback, not git worktree list

expectations.text: Reads memory.md from the parent of the main worktree
expectations.evidence: Output contains accurate data from memory.md — ../memory.md happened to resolve correctly from this worktree location

expectations.text: Reports the current phase (Phase 2: API implementation)
expectations.evidence: Output states: 'Phase 2: API implementation — in progress'

expectations.text: Does not dump the entire memory file verbatim to the user
expectations.evidence: Output is a concise summary, not a verbatim dump

eval_feedback.overall: Baseline worked well because ../memory.md happened to resolve correctly from the sibling worktree.
